name: United States Antimony Corporation
description: United States Antimony Corporation (USAC) is a natural resource company that produces, processes, and sells antimony, zeolite, and precious metals. Founded in 1970, the company operates an antimony smelter and precious metals recovery plant in Montana, as well as antimony mining and processing facilities in Mexico. USAC also mines and processes zeolite through its subsidiary, Bear River Zeolite, in Idaho. The company's products are used in various industrial applications, including flame retardants, plastics, lead-acid batteries, and environmental filtration.
